column3: ['Verify the remuneration of trainers and assessors does not depend on the number of assessments they conduct. ', 'Confirm that trainers and assessors are not conducting assessments for the same students or cohorts. ', 'Check if persons who conduct FSTD qualification testing are free from any pressure that could affect their judgement or assessment results. ']
column4: ['The remuneration for trainers and assessors should be consistent regardless of the number of assessments they perform. ', 'Trainers and assessors should not have overlapping roles in terms of instructing and assessing the same students or cohorts. ', 'Persons conducting FSTD qualification testing should not be under any undue influence that may impact their impartiality during assessments. ']
